definitions.Architect: Primary responsibility is technical design — system design, architecture decisions, technical vision. Sets the direction but may also code.
definitions.Develop: Primary responsibility is implementing features — writing code, building products. The default for most software engineer roles.
definitions.Test: Primary responsibility is quality engineering — test automation, SDET, QA, performance testing, integration test frameworks.
definitions.Manage: Primary responsibility is people/delivery management — engineering manager, team lead with direct reports, delivery management.
definitions.Support: Primary responsibility is production support — L2/L3, on-call, incident response, debugging live systems, SRE support tier.
definitions.Solutions_Architect: Pre-sales or customer-facing technical advisory — RFPs, proposals, cross-domain solutions, client-facing demos, not writing production code.

Architect: tech lead with no direct reports
